text_blocks.text: Bibliography

Ablowitz, M. J., Fokas, A. S. (2003). [[em]]Complex variables: introduction and applications[[/em]] (2nd
                    ed). Cambridge University Press.

Brown, J. W., Churchill, R. V. (2009). [[em]]Complex Variables and Applications.[[/em]] 8th Edition. New
                    York: McGraw-Hill Higher Education.

Crone, L. (n.d.) [[em]]Color graphs of complex functions.[[/em]] [[a
                        href="http://fs2.american.edu/lcrone/www/ComplexPlot.html" target="_blank" title="Open link"
                        class="w3-text-indigo w3-hover-text-blue"]][[i class="fas fa-external-link-alt"]][[/i]][[/a]]

Farris, F. (1997). [[em]]Visualizing complex-valued functions in the plane.[[/em]] [[a
                        href="http://www.maa.org/pubs/amm_complements/complex.html" target="_blank" title="Open link"
                        class="w3-text-indigo w3-hover-text-blue"]][[i class="fas fa-external-link-alt"]][[/i]][[/a]]

Farris, F. (1998). Review of Visual Complex Analysis. By Tristan Needham. [[em]]The American
                        Mathematical Monthly[[/em]], 105(6), 570-576. [[a href="https://www.jstor.org/stable/2589427"
                        target="_blank" title="Open link" class="w3-text-indigo w3-hover-text-blue"]][[i
                            class="fas fa-external-link-alt"]][[/i]][[/a]]

Farris, F. A. (2017). Domain Coloring and the Argument Principle. [[em]]PRIMUS[[/em]] 27:8-9, 827-844,
                    DOI: [[a href="https://doi.org/10.1080/10511970.2016.1234526" target="_blank" title="Open link"
                        class="w3-text-indigo w3-hover-text-blue"]]10.1080/10511970.2016.1234526[[/a]]

Losada-Liste, R. (2014). El color dinámico de GeoGebra. [[em]]Gaceta De La Real Sociedad Matemática
                        Española[[/em]], 17, 525-547, Madrid.

Lundmark, H. (2004). [[em]]Visualizing complex analytic functions using domain coloring.[[/em]] [[a
                        href="http://users.mai.liu.se/hanlu09/complex/domain_coloring.html" target="_blank"
                        title="Open link" class="w3-text-indigo w3-hover-text-blue"]][[i
                            class="fas fa-external-link-alt"]][[/i]][[/a]]

Needham, T. (1997). [[em]]Visual Complex Analysis.[[/em]] Oxford University Press, Oxford. [[a
                        href="http://usf.usfca.edu/vca/" target="_blank" title="Open link"
                        class="w3-text-indigo w3-hover-text-blue"]][[i class="fas fa-external-link-alt"]][[/i]][[/a]]

Marsden, J. E. & Hoffman, M. J. (1987) [[em]]Basic Complex Analysis.[[/em]] (2nd ed.) W. H. Freeman
                    and Co,
                    New York.

Poelke, K. & Polthier, K. (2012) Domain coloring of complex functions: An
                    implementation-oriented introduction.
                    [[em]]IEEE Computer Graphics Math & Applications[[/em]] 32(5), pp. 90-97, DOI: [[a
                        href="https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/6311374" target="_blank" title="Open link"
                        class="w3-text-indigo w3-hover-text-blue"]]10.1109/MCG.2012.100[[/a]]

Ponce Campuzano, J. C. (2019) The use of phase portraits to visualize and investigate isolated
                    singular points of complex functions [[em]]Journal International Journal of Mathematical Education in
                        Science and Technology.[[/em]] 50(7), pp. 999-1010, DOI: [[a
                        href="https://doi.org/10.1080/0020739X.2019.1656829" target="_blank" title="Open link"
                        class="w3-text-indigo w3-hover-text-blue"]]10.1080/0020739X.2019.1656829[[/a]]

Thaller, B. (1998). Visualization of complex functions, [[em]]Mathematica J.,[[/em]] Vol. 7, issue 2. [[a
                        href="https://vqm.uni-graz.at/articles/complexvis/complexvis.pdf" target="_blank"
                        title="Open link" class="w3-text-indigo w3-hover-text-blue"]][[i
                            class="fas fa-external-link-alt"]][[/i]][[/a]]

Farris, F. A. (1998). Review of Visual Complex Analysis. By Tristan Needham. [[em]]American
                        Mathematical Monthly[[/em]] 105 (1998), 570–576.

Wahlström, D. (2018). [[em]]The Great Picard Theorem.[[/em]] Bachelor's Thesis. Sweeden: UMEÅ
                    University.
                    [[a href="https://umu.diva-portal.org/smash/get/diva2:1251778/FULLTEXT01.pdf" target="_blank"
                        title="Open link" class="w3-text-indigo w3-hover-text-blue"]]
                        [[i class="fas fa-external-link-alt"]][[/i]][[/a]]

Wegert, E. (2010). Phase Diagrams of Meromorphic Functions. [[em]]Comput. Methods Funct.[[/em]] Theory
                    10, 639-661.
                    [[a href="https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/BF03321784" target="_blank" title="Open link"
                        class="w3-text-indigo w3-hover-text-blue"]][[i class="fas fa-external-link-alt"]][[/i]][[/a]]

Wegert, E. (2012). [[em]]Visual Complex Functions: An introduction with phase
                        portraits.[[/em]] New York: Springer Basel.
                    [[a href="http://www.springer.com/de/book/9783034801799" target="_blank" title="Open link"
                        class="w3-text-indigo w3-hover-text-blue"]][[i class="fas fa-external-link-alt"]][[/i]][[/a]]

Wegert, E. (2016). Visual exploration of complex functions. In T. Qian and L. R. Rodino (eds.),
                    [[em]]Mathematical analysis, probability and applications - Plenary Lectures SPMS[[/em]] (Vol. 177. pp.
                    253-279). Switzerland: Springer International Publishing.

Wegert, E. & Semmler, G. (2011). Phase plots of complex functions: a journey in illustration.
                    [[em]]Notices Amer. Math. Soc.[[/em]] 58, 768-780. [[a
                        href="https://www.ams.org/notices/201106/rtx110600768p.pdf" target="_blank" title="Open link"
                        class="w3-text-indigo w3-hover-text-blue"]][[i class="fas fa-external-link-alt"]][[/i]][[/a]]

Wikipedia: [[em]]Domain Coloring[[/em]] [[a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Domain_coloring"
                        target="_blank" title="Open link" class="w3-text-indigo w3-hover-text-blue"]][[i
                            class="fas fa-external-link-alt"]][[/i]][[/a]]

[[strong]]That's it![[/strong]] If you found this book useful and help you in your journey to understand [[em]]Complex Analysis[[/em]], please [[a href="https://forms.gle/PhCrkFyGCkiiYLPc7"]]let me know![[/a]] You can also support this project with the links below. Your support will be appreciated!

_protected_html:
@@verbatim:0:46e4db@@

Bibliography

  1. Ablowitz, M. J., Fokas, A. S. (2003). Complex variables: introduction and applications (2nd ed). Cambridge University Press.
  2. Brown, J. W., Churchill, R. V. (2009). Complex Variables and Applications. 8th Edition. New York: McGraw-Hill Higher Education.
  3. Crone, L. (n.d.) Color graphs of complex functions.
  4. Farris, F. (1997). Visualizing complex-valued functions in the plane.
  5. Farris, F. (1998). Review of Visual Complex Analysis. By Tristan Needham. The American Mathematical Monthly, 105(6), 570-576.
  6. Farris, F. A. (2017). Domain Coloring and the Argument Principle. PRIMUS 27:8-9, 827-844, DOI: 10.1080/10511970.2016.1234526
  7. Losada-Liste, R. (2014). El color dinámico de GeoGebra. Gaceta De La Real Sociedad Matemática Española, 17, 525-547, Madrid.
  8. Lundmark, H. (2004). Visualizing complex analytic functions using domain coloring.
  9. Needham, T. (1997). Visual Complex Analysis. Oxford University Press, Oxford.
  10. Marsden, J. E. & Hoffman, M. J. (1987) Basic Complex Analysis. (2nd ed.) W. H. Freeman and Co, New York.
  11. Poelke, K. & Polthier, K. (2012) Domain coloring of complex functions: An implementation-oriented introduction. IEEE Computer Graphics Math & Applications 32(5), pp. 90-97, DOI: 10.1109/MCG.2012.100
  12. Ponce Campuzano, J. C. (2019) The use of phase portraits to visualize and investigate isolated singular points of complex functions Journal International Journal of Mathematical Education in Science and Technology. 50(7), pp. 999-1010, DOI: 10.1080/0020739X.2019.1656829
  13. Thaller, B. (1998). Visualization of complex functions, Mathematica J., Vol. 7, issue 2.
  14. Farris, F. A. (1998). Review of Visual Complex Analysis. By Tristan Needham. American Mathematical Monthly 105 (1998), 570–576.
  15. Wahlström, D. (2018). The Great Picard Theorem. Bachelor's Thesis. Sweeden: UMEÅ University.
  16. Wegert, E. (2010). Phase Diagrams of Meromorphic Functions. Comput. Methods Funct. Theory 10, 639-661.
  17. Wegert, E. (2012). Visual Complex Functions: An introduction with phase portraits. New York: Springer Basel.
  18. Wegert, E. (2016). Visual exploration of complex functions. In T. Qian and L. R. Rodino (eds.), Mathematical analysis, probability and applications - Plenary Lectures SPMS (Vol. 177. pp. 253-279). Switzerland: Springer International Publishing.
  19. Wegert, E. & Semmler, G. (2011). Phase plots of complex functions: a journey in illustration. Notices Amer. Math. Soc. 58, 768-780.
  20. Wikipedia: Domain Coloring

That's it! If you found this book useful and help you in your journey to understand Complex Analysis, please let me know! You can also support this project with the links below. Your support will be appreciated!

Patreon    PayPal    Buy a T-shirt


❤️
